name: softcar-playwright-bdd
description: Playwright + TypeScript + BDD API tests for the VCC softcar C3 flow

scripts.test: npm run bddgen && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r tsconfig-paths/register" playwright test
scripts.test:c3: npm run bddgen && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r tsconfig-paths/register" playwright test --grep @c3
scripts.test:headed: npm run bddgen && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r tsconfig-paths/register" playwright test --headed
scripts.test:debug: npm run bddgen && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r tsconfig-paths/register" playwright test --debug
scripts.test:ui: npm run bddgen && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r tsconfig-paths/register" playwright test --ui
